{
  "judge_id": "J001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.6", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 4,
    "R1.6": 5,
    "R1.7": 4,
    "RX.1": 4,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The agent flags two substantive claims that need softening or support, demonstrating a good audit of load-bearing claims.",
    "R1.6": "The output reads as a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register and no loss of meaning, improving flow and concision.",
    "R1.7": "The agent flags the uncertainty around the Wang et al. (2021) citation and suggests verifying it, showing engagement with citations.",
    "RX.1": "The agent identifies and flags uncertainties for several claims, providing specific recommendations to address them.",
    "RX.3": "The output stays within the agreed scope without any drift.",
    "RX.4": "The output does not introduce new errors or harmful content and identifies potential issues in the original text.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, ensuring traceability."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "R1.6": 0.95,
    "R1.7": 0.85,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.95
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent flags two substantive claims that need softening or support, demonstrating a good audit of load-bearing claims.
rationale.R1.6: The output reads as a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register and no loss of meaning, improving flow and concision.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flags the uncertainty around the Wang et al. (2021) citation and suggests verifying it, showing engagement with citations.
rationale.RX.1: The agent identifies and flags uncertainties for several claims, providing specific recommendations to address them.
rationale.RX.3: The output stays within the agreed scope without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: The output does not introduce new errors or harmful content and identifies potential issues in the original text.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, ensuring traceability.
